utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each required item is specified with the type of coverage and associated costs: health_coverage includes physical and mental health with monthly/annual costs and totals; property_coverage includes home/contents with monthly/annual costs and totals; travel_coverage includes travel insurance with costs and totals; additional_services lists enhancement services with costs and totals; total_budget provides complete monthly/annual totals. All items are fully specified with the required details.
